I

InterviewBookingService - Class in bupt.ta.service
Coordinates bookable interview slots for applicants and module organisers.
InterviewBookingService() - Constructor for class bupt.ta.service.InterviewBookingService
 
InterviewBookingService.ActionResult - Class in bupt.ta.service
Success or failure from a booking action with a user-facing message.
InterviewBookingService.SlotSummary - Class in bupt.ta.service
Interview slot with current bookings and remaining capacity.
InterviewCalendarSupport - Class in bupt.ta.util
Builds simple iCalendar payloads for interview appointments.
InterviewEvaluation - Class in bupt.ta.model
MO interview assessment for one application.

Normalizes the MO interview notice time sent to shortlisted applicants.
InterviewScheduleSupport - Class in bupt.ta.util
Normalizes the MO posting form's estimated interview time.
InterviewSlot - Class in bupt.ta.model
A bookable interview slot for one job posting.

TYPE_AUTO_PROMOTED - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
Waitlisted applicant auto-promoted to selected.
TYPE_DECISION_RECORDED - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
Final select/reject decision recorded.
TYPE_EVALUATION_SAVED - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
MO saved interview evaluation.
TYPE_INTERVIEW_BOOKED - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
TA booked an interview slot.
TYPE_INTERVIEW_CANCELLED - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
TA cancelled a booked interview slot.
TYPE_INTERVIEW_NOTICE - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
Interview notice sent to applicant.
TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
Status transition recorded on an application.
TYPE_SUBMITTED - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
Application submitted by TA.
TYPE_WITHDRAWN - Static variable in class bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService
TA withdrew the application.
